name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy plugin for Claude Code — feature flags, A/B experiments, event metrics, translations, in-app bug reports. One install, one MCP registration, all features nested under /shipeasy:<area>:<verb>.

plugins.name: shipeasy
plugins.description: End-to-end Shipeasy plugin: base SDK install + auth + bind, plus experiments, metrics, gates, configs, kill switches, alert rules, translations, and feedback. Three install sections — /shipeasy:ops:install, /shipeasy:flags:install (gates+configs+ks+experiments+events+alert rules), /shipeasy:i18n:install. Slash commands live at /shipeasy:setup, /shipeasy:experiments:{create,list,start,status,update,stop,archive}, /shipeasy:metrics:{create,list,show,grammar}, /shipeasy:flags:{install,create,list,update}, /shipeasy:configs:{create,list,update}, /shipeasy:ks:{create,list,toggle_switch}, /shipeasy:alerts:{create,list,update}, /shipeasy:i18n:{install,extract,migrate,validate,update,profiles,translate}, /shipeasy:ops:{install,list,report,work,create_trigger}. Deletions are UI-only — no delete commands ship. Registers the shipeasy MCP server. Replaces the deprecated base/experiments-metrics/configs-gates/polylang/bugs plugins.
